title: Anyone got a picture of Femme Kaworu
display_title: Anyone got a picture of Femme Kaworu
wikitext:
[]: Anyone got a picture of Femme-Kaworu? Post by ChronoX » Wed Jul 12, 2006 7:21 pm I was wondering if anyone had a picture of Femme-Kaworu? This character intrigues me

[]: Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 12, 2006 8:29 pm Are you talking about... * femme-Kaworu" in the sense of the term's original usage (the wonky Reichu theory that the Kaworu in the show is actually female) or... * "femme-Kaworu" as per the liberal subsequent usage it inevitably inspires, e.g., *any* female version of Kaworu, namely one with "tits and ass"?

[]: Post by Ryousanki King » Wed Jul 12, 2006 8:38 pm Reichu wrote: Are you talking about "femme-Kaworu" in the sense of its original usage -- the wonky Reichu theory that the Kaworu in the show is actually female --, or "femme-Kaworu" as per the liberal subsequent usage it inevitably inspires, e.g., *any* female version of Kaworu, namely one with "tits and ass"?

[]: Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 12, 2006 11:02 pm Ryousanki King wrote: I'ma take a stab in the dark and say he's going for the one with tits and ass. *cough*I'dhitit*cough*

[]: Post by ThroneofDravaris » Wed Jul 12, 2006 11:26 pm Link stolen from the 'New Gainax figures - Angels in female human form' thread Lolz I came

[]: Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 13, 2006 12:14 am ^ And Kaworu doesn't even need to be changed that much to satisfy the requirements for Lilim female somatotype.

[]: Post by DatDude » Thu Jul 13, 2006 12:27 am Must kill female Kaworu with fire

[]: Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 13, 2006 12:30 am DatDude wrote: Must kill female Kaworu with fire

[]: Post by DatDude » Thu Jul 13, 2006 12:45 am ALL OF THEM! Male Kaworu is creepy enough!

[]: Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 13, 2006 1:19 am I used to find anime Kaworu creepy. Then manga Kaworu came along and provided a bit of "perspective". But, seriously. After a while, something clicked, and suddenly Kaworu was up there as a 2nd-tier Favorite Character of mine. Besides, not liking Kaworu is like shunning Holy Mother Adam, and that just won't do.

[]: Post by DatDude » Thu Jul 13, 2006 1:29 am I just have the POV that he berayed Shinji by doing that he did leaving the boy broken and easier to deal with when seele used unit one as a conduit for liltih. Heck if not for old Rei seele would have gotten their way. but back on topic. Girl Kaworu picture has been provided. God is in heaven all is right with the world. May I have a lock please Reichu?

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jul 13, 2006 1:29 am Reichu wrote: Where are all of the guys who dig flat chicks, eh? ;)

[]: Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 13, 2006 1:44 am Mr. Tines wrote: Did someone just say "delicious flat chests"? 4chan, probably.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jul 13, 2006 2:01 am Reichu wrote: Mr. Tines wrote: Did someone just say "delicious flat chests"? 4chan, probably.

[]: Post by ChronoX » Thu Jul 13, 2006 9:20 am ThroneofDravaris wrote: Link stolen from the 'New Gainax figures - Angels in female human form' thread Lolz I came
